debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
I J : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
h_J_le_I : I ≤ J
h_I_le_J : J ≤ I
h_final_left : ∀ N ∈ J, N ∈ I
⊢ ∀ N ∈ I, N ∈ J

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
intro N hN
      have : N ∈ I := hN
      exact h_final_left N (by
        rcases (h_J_le_I hN) with ⟨B, hBsub, hNeq⟩
        have hN_in_J : N ∈ J := by
          by_contra h_not
          have hNB : ∀ b ∈ B, b ∈ I := by
            intro b hb
            exact hBsub hb
          have h_sup_le : sSup B ≤ sSup (SetLike.coe I) := by
            exact sSup_le_sSup hNB
          have h_sup_eq : sSup B = ⊤ := by
            simpa [hNeq, J.sSup_eq_top] using congrArg (fun X => sSup X) (rfl : (SetLike.coe J) = SetLike.coe J)
          have h_top_le : (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) ≤ sSup (SetLike.coe I) := by
            simpa [h_sup_eq] using h_sup_le
          have : (⊤ : PersistenceSubmodule M) ≤ ⊤ := by simpa [I.sSup_eq_top] using h_top_le
          exact h_not (by
            have : N ∈ J := by
              have : N ∈ J := by
                classical
                by_cases hNJ : N ∈ J
                · exact hNJ
                · exfalso
                  exact hNJ (by
                    rcases (h_I_le_J hN) with ⟨B', hB'sub, hNeq'⟩
                    have : N ∈ J := by
                      have : N = sSup B' := hNeq'
                      have : sSup B' ∈ J := by
                        have : sSup (SetLike.coe J) = ⊤ := J.sSup_eq_top
                        simp at this
                        exact False.elim (by
                          have : (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) ∉ J := J.not_bot_mem
                          exact by
                            have : (⊥ : PersistenceSubmodule M) ∈ J := by
                              simp
                            exact this.elim this)
                      exact False.elim (by
                        have : False := by
                          have : N = sSup B' := hNeq'
                          exact False.elim (by trivial)
                        exact this)
                    exact this)
              exact this
            exact this)
        exact hN_in_J)
